behavior_summary: This script implements Bane's dialogue and related small utilities. The primary entry (U8P_BANE2::func0080) handles initial meeting (naming ritual) and repeat conversations, builds menus, captures player choices, and sets persistent flags recording that Bane has met the player and (optionally) learned the avatar's name.

A dedicated branch (U8P_BANE2::func170E) runs a Truename/quest interaction: it asks whether the player has Vardion's Truename, offers a constructed menu of candidate names, validates the player's choice, sets several quest-related flags, and calls DAEMSCEN scene helpers to advance the quest if the correct name is supplied.

Two utility helpers (U8P_BANE2::func0A03 and U8P_BANE2::func0D58) emit short randomized barks/farewells and are used throughout to conclude or bail out of conversations. Another dialog helper (U8P_BANE2::func1162) handles an intermediate apology/response loop and dispatches to recruitment/quest flows.

Mood and quest state flags (e.g., baneMad, acolyteKilled, baneHasAsked, baneJoined, sponsorTest, keyOfTheAcolyte) control tone, available menu options, and whether the NPC escalates to hostility (Npc::setTarget).
notable_control_flow: First-meeting flow vs repeat: U8P_BANE2::func0080 checks baneMet and runs a multi-step spawn/suspend exchange for naming on the first meeting, then sets baneMet and optionally baneAvaName.
Menu-driven branching: multiple Ask menus presented (captured into local menu_choice locals) are strcmp-compared against constructed strings (e.g., "I am <name>.") and literals to determine branches.
Escalation path: repeated lying/insulting in the Truename branch (U8P_BANE2::func170E) increments/sets baneMad and can cause Npc::setTarget(this, 0x01) to make Bane hostile.

Looping apology handler: U8P_BANE2::func1162 presents options repeatedly until player chooses the explicit exit ("Nevermind."), and reconciliatory choices clear baneMad and call recruitment/quest helpers.
open_questions: Exact names and semantics of some flags written in U8P_BANE2::func170E (metadata notes multiple truename/quest flags but exact identifiers are not fully present).
Precise effect and timing of the spawned helper FREE::func1B49 used in the first-meeting naming sequence (appears to be a UI/timed helper but exact role is inferred).
Numeric thresholds and full semantics for baneMad increments / thresholds that trigger hostility (exact increment values and when set are inferred).
Full contents and ordering of the menu constructed in some branches where MenuUnion is conditionally used (some inclusion conditions depend on other flags like vardionJoined, baneFool etc.).

main_function.name: U8P_BANE2::func0080
main_function.purpose: Primary dialogue handler for NPC Bane: manages the introductory naming ritual on first meet, repeat greetings with random variants, presents player choice menus, records whether Bane knows the avatar name, and routes into recruitment or Truename quest branches.
entry_conditions: Player initiates conversation with the NPC (talk interaction or entering NPC conversation trigger).
Fast-area entry semantics apply when the avatar enters Bane's talk region (treated as conversation trigger).

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::func0080
function_map.role: Dialogue entry and conversation manager (first-meeting naming ritual, repeat greetings, menu dispatch).

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::func0A03
function_map.role: Farewell/leave utility: emits randomized short barks and optionally appends recruitment reminder if relevant.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::func0D58
function_map.role: Terse-exit utility: emits short curt lines and suspends when NPC wants to quickly end the exchange.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::func1162
function_map.role: Intermediate dialogue loop handling apologies/reconciliation; clears anger flags and dispatches to recruitment or quest helpers depending on state.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE2::func170E
function_map.role: Truename/quest handler: asks about Vardion's Truename, validates guesses, sets quest flags, and calls DAEMSCEN helpers to progress the ritual/quest.

function_map.name: BANE::func0782
function_map.role: External BANE module call reused for recruitment/related behavior (invoked when reconciling or routing to Bane-specific flows).

internal_calls.purpose: Invoke a farewell/leave bark sequence during or at end of certain conversation branches.
Invoke a terse/curt exit line when Bane has little patience or to bail out of conversation branches.
Hand off to an intermediate apology/reconciliation dialog that can route into recruitment or quest flows.
Enter the Truename/quest branch (ask/validate Vardion's Truename) when relevant menu choice or state conditions require it.
Dispatch into the Truename quest branch when reconciliation flow indicates the player should proceed to that quest path.

external_calls.purpose: Spawn/present a yes/no UI when asking the player to accept the offered name or confirm having Vardion's Truename; result read via process_result().
Spawned helper/process during the first-meeting sequence (likely a UI, animation, or timed wait used around suspend calls).
Advance the Daemon/Cabal scene or Ritual when the correct Truename is supplied.
Continue or validate quest progression in the Truename flow (secondary scene helper call).
Set the NPC's combat target / make Bane hostile when the player repeatedly lies or insults about the Truename (escalation).
Call external BANE behavior for recruitment or Bane-module specific sequences when the player reconciles and is not yet joined.

reads.name: baneMad
reads.likely_effect: Controls Bane's mood/tone selection (curt/hostile vs neutral) and affects which dialogue variants are used; also read to decide escalation behavior.

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: Influences branching for greetings and whether to route to specific quest/scene continuations (used to choose between U8P_BANE2::func170E and DAEMSCEN helpers).

reads.name: baneHasAsked
reads.likely_effect: Indicates Bane previously offered recruitment; used to optionally append a recruitment reminder in farewells.

reads.name: baneJoined
reads.likely_effect: Indicates player has joined; combined with baneHasAsked to suppress further recruitment prompts.

reads.name: sponsorTest
reads.likely_effect: Used in conditional greeting/recruitment branches (inferred effect on membership checks).

reads.name: keyOfTheAcolyte
reads.likely_effect: Affects greeting text related to acolyte state (inferred conditional usage).

writes.name: baneMet
writes.likely_effect: Set when the initial meeting/naming ritual completes so the first-meeting flow does not repeat.

writes.name: baneAvaName
writes.likely_effect: Set when Bane accepts/records the avatar's supplied name (player choice matched constructed "I am <name>."), marking that Bane knows the player name.

writes.name: baneFool
writes.likely_effect: Set when a specific incorrect Truename answer is chosen (marks the player as acting foolish about the Truename).

writes.name: baneIdiot
writes.likely_effect: Set when another specific insulting/mistaken Truename answer is chosen.

writes.name: baneMoron
writes.likely_effect: Set when yet another insulting/mistaken Truename answer is chosen.

writes.name: baneFalse
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player first claims not to know the Truename; used to detect repeated lying and escalate punishment.

writes.name: baneMad
writes.likely_effect: Modified/incremented when the player lies or insults; higher values cause more hostile dialogue and can trigger combat via Npc::setTarget.

writes.name: acolyteKilled
writes.likely_effect: Set (value 0x02 inferred) when the player supplies the correct Truename (Morduin), marking progress in the related quest/scene.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements Bane's dialogue and related small utilities. The primary entry (U8P_BANE2::func0080) handles initial meeting (naming ritual) and repeat conversations, builds menus, captures player choices, and sets persistent flags recording that Bane has met the player and (optionally) learned the avatar's name.
